text: A picture of a fast moving car at dusk.
A pier with many boats and docks in a busy waterway area.
A child swinging a bat in batters box.
A large truck hauling a passenger rail car.
A tall building with palm trees on the right side of it.
A row of custom scooters parked on the gravel.
A woman throws a red Frisbee at the beach.
An old black and white photo of a baseball game in progress.
Several boats in the water near two rock outcroppings.
A group of young men riding down a snow covered slope.
